# themes/nord.py - Nord Theme

Nord color scheme.

---

## Theme: `nord`

The Nord color scheme - an arctic, bluish color palette.

### Color Palette

| Name | Hex | Usage |
|------|-----|-------|
| `nord0` | `#2E3440` | Polar Night (backgrounds) |
| `nord1` | `#3B4252` | Polar Night |
| `nord2` | `#434C5E` | Polar Night |
| `nord3` | `#4C566A` | Polar Night |
| `nord4` | `#D8DEE9` | Snow Storm (foregrounds) |
| `nord5` | `#E5E9F0` | Snow Storm |
| `nord6` | `#ECEFF4` | Snow Storm |
| `nord7` | `#8FBCBB` | Frost (teal) |
| `nord8` | `#88C0D0` | Frost (cyan) |
| `nord9` | `#81A1C1` | Frost (blue) |
| `nord10` | `#5E81AC` | Frost (dark blue) |
| `nord11` | `#BF616A` | Aurora (red) |
| `nord12` | `#D08770` | Aurora (orange) |
| `nord13` | `#EBCB8B` | Aurora (yellow) |
| `nord14` | `#A3BE8C` | Aurora (green) |
| `nord15` | `#B48EAD` | Aurora (purple) |

### Usage

```python
app = App(theme="nord")
```
